title: The Prime Minister's Vaisakhi message 2023
body: "I want to wish Sikhs across the UK and around the world a very happy Vaisakhi.  You make an incredible contribution to national life. From the heroes of both world wars to those working in the modern-day NHS, Sikhs have played a huge role in making Britain what it is today.  As your PM I thank you for everything you do, and whether celebrating this auspicious occasion at your local Gurdwara or at home with loved ones, I hope you have a wonderful day.  Saareya nu Vaisakhi diyan lakh lakh vadhaiyan! "
